name: Broadcast
description: Jellyfin Broadcast generates a continuous programming schedule from your media library and exposes it as a live channel with M3U/XMLTV support.
overview: Turns your Jellyfin library into a single always-on TV channel

versions.changelog: Config page now shows ready-to-copy M3U/XMLTV/Stream URLs (with API key included) for adding the channel to Jellyfin's own Live TV as a tuner + guide.
